question: Will Sm metal (Western) spot price exceed 50 USD/kg on May 31, 2026?
textDescription:
This market resolves YES if Sm metal (Western) spot price exceeds 50 USD/kg on May 31, 2026.

What is being measured: Samarium metal (Sm, 99%+ purity) spot price in the Western market (ex-China Western assessment), USD/kg, on or nearest to May 31, 2026.

YES if: Western Sm metal spot price >= 50 USD/kg on May 31, 2026 NO if: Western Sm metal spot price < 50 USD/kg on May 31, 2026

Resolution sources (priority order):

Argus REE samarium metal — Western assessment

Asian Metal — samarium metal Western or ex-China prices

Fastmarkets (ex-Metal Pages) Sm metal Western spot

SMM samarium metal Western assessment
newsShortReason: Samarium metal spot prices have remained well below $50 USD/kg in recent years.
newsKeyEvidence: As of May 19, 2026, samarium metal 99.5% purity was priced at $10.44 USD/kg in EXW China. ([scrapmonster.com](https://www.scrapmonster.com/metal-prices/rare-earth/samarium/953?utm_source=openai)) | On May 20, 2026, samarium metal was priced at $9,713.26 USD/tonne, equivalent to approximately $9.71 USD/kg. ([www-old.metal.com](https://www-old.metal.com/Rare-Earth-Metals/?utm_source=openai)) | Historical data shows that samarium metal prices have consistently been below $50 USD/kg over the past several years.
